'''âk-n-h-w''' ('''kakanhewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jasperize|jasperize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jasperize|jasperize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-n-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kakanhewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikanhewoko|thikanhewoko]] || [[word:jikanhewoko|jikanhewoko]] || [[word:shikanhewoko|shikanhewoko]] || [[word:kikanhewoko|kikanhewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
